creator: otis@FreeBSD.org
text: My memory did not served me right. To add to 1, I've been playing with mongodb 4.x (4.2 or 4.4) with unifi6 at home, then I abandoned it for some reason (there were some problems that I could not work around at that time, lack of time prevented me from further investigation back then. I will surely return to it in near future).
